message:
feat(missions): add discoverable + button to AI missions sidebar (#6101)

Changes the new mission toolbar button in the mission sidebar header from
a Sparkles icon to a Plus icon with a purple accent ring so it is more
discoverable for new users (the + convention is universally recognized
for 'add new').

Reuses the existing new-mission toggle handler — no duplicate action
logic. The Plus button is visually distinct from the font-size Plus
control via its purple ring and background, so the two do not collide.

Adds the 'missionSidebar.newMissionButton' i18n key for the aria-label
and tooltip.

Fixes #6095

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1620,6 +1620,7 @@
     "expandSidebar": "Expand sidebar",
     "aiMissions": "AI Missions",
     "startNewMission": "Start new mission",
+    "newMissionButton": "New mission",
     "decreaseFontSize": "Decrease font size",
     "increaseFontSize": "Increase font size",
     "exitFullScreen": "Exit full screen",
